title: Where your data lives at inference time
assumptions: Architectural fact, not a projection. Reflects how each deployment model routes data at inference time.

source.citation: Hive on-prem reference architecture. Open-weight model weights and inference execute on customer hardware; no inference call leaves the network boundary.

title: Output cost per million tokens
assumptions: Hosted-API pricing. Self-hosting economics differ. Open range reflects published open-weight model API pricing; proprietary range reflects published frontier model API pricing.

source.citation: Published hosted-API price sheets for open-weight and proprietary frontier models, captured June 2026. Re-verify before publish.
source.provenance: Public pricing pages. Figures must be re-pulled at pre-publish.

title: Best open-weight versus best closed model
assumptions: Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index v4.0. Rankings shift frequently. Verify current standings before citing.

source.citation: Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index v4.0. Best open 54, best closed 60.
source.provenance: Third-party benchmark. Re-verify current standings at artificialanalysis.ai before publish.

title: On-prem hardware entry points
assumptions: Approximate hardware prices as of June 2026, rising. Hardware is a workstation-class box you own, not a recurring bill.

source.citation: Published hardware pricing for AMD Strix Halo 128GB class systems and NVIDIA DGX Spark, captured June 2026.
source.provenance: Public vendor listings. Prices approximate and rising; re-verify before publish.

title: 36-month total cost of ownership
assumptions: Assumes 10M output tokens per month. Power-only opex, excludes labour. Hardware prices approx. June 2026. Band, not a point estimate.

source.citation: Modelled 36-month TCO. Strix payback approx month 7, DGX payback approx month 17. Month-36 totals approx $2,391 (Strix) and $5,261 (DGX) versus approx $10,800 cloud API.
source.provenance: Internal TCO model. Inputs approximate; re-verify hardware and power inputs before publish.
